parameters-en.Rate: Controls the speed of the chorus’ low-frequency oscillator (LFO) from slow to fast.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the amplitude of the modulation, from mild to deep.
parameters-en.NumVoices: Determines the number of voices in the chorus (2, 3, or 4).
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (high pass) filter to the chorus, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency.
parameters-en.High Shelf: Applies a high cut (low pass) filter to the fills, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the chorus effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no chorus effect is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
